name: idiom-wordle
description: 成语版 Wordle — 每日猜成语，拼音反馈 + 部首提示 + 社交分享

scripts.test: node test/demo.js && node test/score.js && node test/project-health.js
scripts.daily: node -e "const { getDailyIdiom } = require('./src/daily'); const d = getDailyIdiom(); console.log('今日成语:', d.text, d.pinyin.join(' '));"
